title: EVANGELION3010 AVANT 1 from beginning to 1040 Version 0706 discussion and prediction thread
display_title: EVANGELION3010 AVANT 1 from beginning to 1040 Version 0706 discussion and prediction thread
wikitext:
[]: "EVANGELION:3.0+1.0 AVANT 1 (from beginning to 10:40) Version 0706" discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Jun 25, 2019 5:39 am Since this is probably going to generate a lot of posts for a while I think it's better to create a thread for it. What we know so far: On July 6th khara will show the first 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 at Japan Expo in Paris (I think I read it will be present Takahashi during/after her concert), at ANIME EXPO in Los Angeles, in Shanghai and in various places in Japan. It's unclear if those are exclusive screenings or if it will be simultaneously available on the app or on internet. No other details were shared yet.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Jun 25, 2019 12:29 pm The previous two movies opened with an action set piece involving Mari, so I feel like we're going to see the battle with Unit 08 ICC for sure. Maybe Shinji, Asuka and Rei will get attacked by something wandering the wastes.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Tue Jun 25, 2019 12:36 pm ....or we'll get a time skip.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by Keiji » Tue Jun 25, 2019 1:02 pm xtr00kvltcorex wrote: ....or we'll get a time skip.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Jun 25, 2019 1:15 pm Couldn't have much of a skip considering Unit 08 is still bandaged from the end of 3.0 and they haven't even painted the replacement parts on the feet.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Jun 25, 2019 1:21 pm An action scene seems a safe bet, but I don't know why I think a flashback pre-Q could a possibility too.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jun 25, 2019 1:27 pm Options are really endless. Which is pretty cool. Most likely bet in my eyes is still it being an opening action setpiece that takes place right after the end of 3.0 where WILLIE has to use Unit 08, their only (partially) functional Eva at the moment, to act as defense from something NERV sends their way. This would fall in line with how almost all of the early marketing for Evangelion 3.0 centered around Asuka recapturing Unit 01 in space. I also keep thinking in Final we could actually see the experiment where Yui became one with Unit 01, which could work for the story of the film if Shinji & Rei Q meet the Rei from the first two films also caught inside the Eva, because she's the one integral element of Shinji's journey we haven't spent any real time with. Seeing her disappear in the Eva and it going berserk or something could make for a great opening. OR it could be one key moment from the timeskip era. But really the options are endless.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by Keiji » Tue Jun 25, 2019 1:42 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: I also keep thinking in Final we could actually see the experiment where Yui became one with Unit 01, which could work for the story of the film if Shinji & Rei Q meet the Rei from the first two films also caught inside the Eva, because she's the one integral element of Shinji's journey we haven't spent any real time with. Seeing her disappear in the Eva and it going berserk or something could make for a great opening.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Jun 25, 2019 1:45 pm ^"Q" or "Quickening" is one of the alternate titles for 3.0, yes. Rei Q being the black-suited 3.0 Rei.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by Keiji » Tue Jun 25, 2019 1:55 pm Thank you.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Jun 25, 2019 3:58 pm Since all Rebuild films have started with an action set piece, (Eva-01 vs 4th angel in 1.0, Eva-05 vs 3rd angel in 2.0 and Eva-02 vs Nemesis series in 3.0), it's safe to assume the next film starts the same way. Probably Eva-08 vs Mass produced Mark.06's (?) seen in the preview.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Tue Jun 25, 2019 4:04 pm Keiji wrote: A short one or a long one in your opinion.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2019 9:06 am Am I the only one that can't be bothered with this? Just give me the whole movie when it's done and polished.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2019 9:10 am Most likely bet in my eyes is still it being an opening action setpiece that takes place right after the end of 3.0 where WILLIE has to use Unit 08, their only (partially) functional Eva at the moment, to act as defense from something NERV sends their way.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Wed Jun 26, 2019 9:14 am kuribo-04 wrote: I have a feeling the three mains will have some time alone first.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Jun 26, 2019 10:19 am kuribo-04 wrote: We know for sure though AVANT1 features a line spoken by Asuka and another one in Shinji's mind. I don't know if that's where Mari will come in. I have a feeling the three mains will have some time alone first, while AVANT2 (which features at least one Wille member) will be the Mari scene.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Jun 26, 2019 10:22 am ^ My thoughts exactly when I saw that. Only thing we know for sure is.... we know nothing for sure.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Wed Jun 26, 2019 10:34 am What I do know, is that I want that shit to pop up online today in some form. The only reason I woke up this morning.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 26, 2019 10:57 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Only thing we know for sure is.... we know nothing for sure.

[]: Re: Initial 10m40s of 3.0+1.0 discussion and prediction thread             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jun 26, 2019 11:31 am BlueBasilisk wrote: We do? :???:
